sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84752" key="poludeh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠ-δεής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">δέομαι</etym>) <sense id="n84752.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wanting much,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> </bibl> Tyr. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:21:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
